summary:
Feature: DEEP AUDIT: hx-top-nav — Enterprise Component Quality Review

## Deep Audit V2: hx-top-nav

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-top-nav` component. NOTE: This is one of 9 incomplete components (no index.ts) from the PR 175 rescue batch.

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — All colors, spacing, typography use `--hx-*` tokens. No hardcoded values.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. Navigation landmark, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, mobile me
